**Client-Side (Consumer Application):**
1. `KafkaConsumer.commitSync()` - User-facing API entry point

8. `OffsetMetadataManager.commitOffset()` - Validates and processes the offset commit
9. `GroupCoordinatorRecordHelpers.newOffsetCommitRecord()` - Creates the actual record to persist
10. `CoordinatorRuntime.append()` + `PartitionWriter.append()` - Appends records to the `__consumer_offsets` topic
